official_raw_source.version_note: Small corrections to a few pixels that were labelled nuclei but were not.
official_raw_source.paper_gt_semantics: binary annotation; AJI treats ground-truth instances as connected components
official_raw_source.selective_access: extract patients 1-8 only; never open or record patients 9-11 members

protocol.closed_test_policy: Never enumerate, read, hash, summarize, visualize, infer, or evaluate during development.
protocol.baseline_label_policy: Use the StainPMS historical prepared inst_map labels for baseline and new-method continuity; provenance audit is descriptive and does not select GT by AJI/PQ.

materialization_note: The two safe AutoDL manifests are authoritative. Their entries and SHA256 values must be copied into a locked training manifest after the Phase 0 audit; this file must not be used for training while status is pending.
